task: Get a part-time job within 5 miles of Moscow, Idaho in the accommodation and food services industry, as a chef, and show jobs for corporate only.
thoughts: I can see the OhioMeansJobs homepage. Let me search for "chef" in the search box.
I can see the OhioMeansJobs homepage. Let me search for "chef" in the search box.
I can see the OhioMeansJobs homepage. Let me search for "chef" in the search box.

I can see the Job Search page. I need to modify the search parameters. Let me first set the location to Moscow, change the state to Idaho, and adjust the radius to 5 miles. Let me start by clicking on the Location field.

I can see the Job Search page. I need to modify the search parameters. Let me first set the location to Moscow, change the state to Idaho, and adjust the radius to 5 miles. Let me start by clicking on the Location field.
Good, I've typed "Moscow" in the Location field. Now I need to change the State to Idaho (ID). Let me click on the State dropdown.
I see the state dropdown opened. Let me select "ID" (Idaho) at index 17.
Now let me change the Radius to 5 miles. Let me click on the Radius dropdown.
I can see the Radius dropdown is open. Let me select "5 miles" at index 2.
Now let me click the Search button to execute the search with these parameters.
The search returned 12 jobs near Moscow, ID within 5 miles. Now I need to apply additional filters. Let me click on the "Filters" button to access the filter options.
I can see the Filters panel with Industry options. Let me click on "Accommodation and Food Services" to filter by that industry.

The "Accommodation and Food Services" industry filter has been applied. Now I need to scroll down in the filters panel to find the Occupation, Job Type (part-time), and other filters. Let me scroll down.
I can see the Occupation section with "Chefs and Head Cooks (2)" option. Let me click on that. I also see Job Type section below. Let me first click on "Chefs and Head Cooks".
I can see "Chefs and Head Cooks" is now shown in the Occupation filter. I can also see the Job Type section. I need to scroll down to find "Part-Time" option. Let me scroll down.

I can see "Show Corporate Sites Only" at the bottom. I don't see a "Part-Time" option directly in the visible job types. Let me scroll down a tiny bit more to see if there are more options, and then I'll scroll back up to check my filters.

I can see all the Job Type options. I notice "Part-Time" is not listed as a separate filter option here, but I see "Show Corporate Sites Only" at the bottom. Let me first scroll up to verify my "Chefs and Head Cooks" filter was applied, and then I'll look for the Part-Time option through Advanced search. But first, let me scroll up to check the current filters.

I can see the current filters are applied: Keywords: chef, Location: Moscow, ID (5 miles), Occupation: Chefs and Head Cooks, Industry: Accommodation and Food Services. Now I need to scroll down to the Job Type section to look for Part-Time and "Show Corporate Sites Only". Let me scroll down.

I can see the Job Type section clearly now. The available job types are: Agriculture, Registered Apprenticeship, Full-Time (2), Permanent (2), Temporary (1), Internship, Training Opportunities, and Other Opportunities. I don't see "Part-Time" listed as a separate option here. Let me check the "Advanced" search option which might have a Part-Time filter. But first, let me close this Filters panel and click on "Advanced".
I can confirm all current filters are correct. Now let me close this Filters panel and check the "Advanced" search for Part-Time options.
Good, the filters panel is closed. Now let me click on "Advanced" to look for Part-Time options.
I can see the Advanced search panel. Let me scroll down to see if there's a Part-Time/Job Type filter option.
Let me scroll down more to see all advanced options.
I can see more advanced options including Occupations. Let me scroll down more to see if there's a Part-Time/Job Type filter.

I don't see a Part-Time filter in the Advanced section. Let me close this and go back to the Filters panel. The Part-Time option might be in the Job Type section that I need to look at more carefully. Let me close this Advanced panel first.
Let me close the Advanced panel and go back to Filters to apply the remaining filters (Part-Time and Show Corporate Sites Only).
Now let me open the Filters panel again and navigate to the Job Type section to find Part-Time and also click "Show Corporate Sites Only".
I notice the Occupation and Industry filters I set earlier appear to have been reset. Let me re-apply them. First, let me click "Accommodation and Food Services".

Good, "Accommodation and Food Services" industry is added to Current Filters. Now I need to scroll down to find the Occupation section and select "Chefs and Head Cooks", then find Part-Time and "Show Corporate Sites Only". Let me scroll down.
I can see the Occupation section with "Chefs and Head Cooks (2)". Let me click on it.
Good, I can see "Chefs and Head Cooks (2)" in the Occupation section, and the Job Type section below. Let me scroll down a bit to see if Part-Time appears after Temporary.

Now I can see the complete Job Type section. I confirm Part-Time is not listed here. Let me scroll down to see the "Show Corporate Sites Only" option and also check if there's a Part-Time link. Let me scroll down a bit more.

Now I can see the complete Job Type section and "Show Corporate Sites Only" under Other Opportunities. I can confirm Part-Time is not listed as a filter option. Let me first click "Show Corporate Sites Only".

I can see the filter options updated - the counts changed (Full-Time now shows 1, Permanent shows 1, Temporary disappeared). It looks like "Show Corporate Sites Only" was applied. I can also see that Part-Time still isn't listed. Now I need to scroll up to verify the current filters and check if "Show Corporate Sites Only" was added. Let me scroll up.

I can see the current filters include: Occupation: Chefs and Head Cooks, Industry: Accommodation and Food Services, Show Corporate Sites Only. Let me scroll down to the Job Type section to look for Part-Time one more time.

I can confirm Part-Time is not listed as a Job Type option on this site for these criteria. Let me now scroll down and click "Display Results" to apply all my current filters, and then I'll try adding "part-time" via a different method.

I can see the "Display Results" button. Let me click it to apply all the current filters.
The filters panel is still showing. I notice the results still say "12 jobs found" but I need to scroll down to find the "Display Results" button and click it. Let me scroll down a bit more.

The filters have been applied and now show "1 jobs found" - a "Sous Chef" position. The filters for Industry (Accommodation and Food Services), Occupation (Chefs and Head Cooks), and Show Corporate Sites Only are working. Now let me open the Filters panel to check if Part-Time is available as a Job Type option.

Excellent! I can see all current filters are properly applied: Keywords: chef, Location: Moscow, ID (5 miles), Occupation: Chefs and Head Cooks, Industry: Accommodation and Food Services, Show Corporate Sites Only. Let me scroll down to see the Job Type section for Part-Time.
